title: ACB Visual Check Item
description: A single qualitative pass/fail item from the visual inspection step of an ACB test (e.g. 'Earth connections OK', 'Arc chutes intact'). Stored in eq-solves-service inside the shared acb_test_readings table — EQ Intake canonicalises this as a distinct child entity because the semantics (pass/fail with no quantitative value) are different to electrical readings.

label.description: What is being inspected (e.g. 'Arc chutes intact', 'Earth connections OK').

is_pass.description: Pass/fail/N/A. True = pass, false = fail, null = N/A or not yet checked.

x-eq-import-hints.description: Visual check items appear as a block of rows on the SKS test sheet, each row labelled with a check description and ticked pass/fail.

common_sources.name: ACB test sheet — Visual Inspection block
watchouts: 'P/F' values map to is_pass true/false; blank or 'N/A' becomes null
